title: Bizarre Industries native Figma exemplar build plan — 04.01 Field Gradient and 06.01 Continuous Lens Aperture v2

figma.computerUse: forbidden unless the official MCP is proven unable to perform a required operation
figma.mutationPolicy: This ledger is read-only planning evidence. A later build must use one sequential use_figma call per page section, switch page at most once per call, load every exact font before text mutation, resolve variables by collection plus name, and return every created or mutated node ID.
buildOrder: verify page, target-frame, locked-reference, and canonical collection IDs
resolve the exact local fonts and text-style inventory
set the explicit Modes collection mode on the existing target frame
create the eleven layer frames in the declared back-to-front order
build the shared header, footer, and page ground
build the page-specific specimen with native Figma geometry
build the twelve anatomy panels from the exact compact copy
lock the internal reference layer and remove every placeholder state
validate hierarchy, variable bindings, fonts, and geometry
capture same-viewport screenshots and compare them beside the locked Affinity reference

sources.role: Meaning, exhaustive section order, visual recipe, source lineage, invariants, and governance status.
Exact rendered dimensions, positions, compact panel copy, layer names, native-gradient stops, and smooth-ellipse construction formulas.
Permanent page names, artboard dimensions, anatomy order, and eleven-layer contract.
Canonical collection, variable, alias, Figma font-family mapping, scope, and code-syntax contract.
Exact 04.01 field-gradient and optical-coating stop values and angles.
Permanent Figma page IDs and names.
Observed local text-style names, exact registered family/style pairs, and existing SDS inventory.
Governed translation from web font stacks to names registered in the live Figma font catalog.

canonicalVariables.resolveBy: collection name plus exact variable name; fail on zero or multiple matches

bindingExceptions.reason: Figma does not expose a stable per-gradient-stop color-variable binding in the governed import contract.
bindingExceptions.requiredHandling: Use the exact governed literals and store each Palette token reference in shared plugin data; never substitute visually similar stops.

bindingExceptions.reason: The Affinity source uses 72 px and 56 px; neither value exists in the canonical Typography size scale.
bindingExceptions.requiredHandling: Use the exact source sizes as explicit page-local values and do not round to 60 px or 80 px.

bindingExceptions.property: 17 px panel heading and body size
bindingExceptions.reason: The exact Affinity source value is not a canonical Typography size token.
bindingExceptions.requiredHandling: Keep 17 px explicitly for reference fidelity; bind the exact family and weight variables.

bindingExceptions.reason: The Affinity source uses #181817 and #EBE9E0, which have no exact canonical semantic variable value.
bindingExceptions.requiredHandling: Keep those exact literals with source annotations; do not silently replace them with a near token during exemplar reconstruction.

bindingExceptions.reason: The approved Atlas orientation family does not include -14 degrees; -14 degrees is the exact r14 visual reconstruction value.
bindingExceptions.requiredHandling: Treat -14 degrees as governed-provisional page geometry, never as a canonical Atlas orientation token.

typography.fontLoadRule: Load every exact family/style pair before creating or mutating any text node.

existingLocalStyleCandidates.name: Display/H2
existingLocalStyleCandidates.decision: Do not apply to these page titles: family weight and size differ from the exact Affinity source.

existingLocalStyleCandidates.name: Label/Eyebrow
existingLocalStyleCandidates.decision: Reference only: the source system rail is Bold with 0.12 em tracking.

existingLocalStyleCandidates.name: Body/Lead
existingLocalStyleCandidates.decision: Reference only: the compact Affinity panel copy is exactly 17 px.

existingLocalStyleCandidates.name: Technical/Label
existingLocalStyleCandidates.decision: Apply only where the source is exactly 12 px Medium with compatible tracking; otherwise use the explicit role below.

smoothLensGeometry.status: OWNER-APPROVED VISUAL DIRECTION / NUMERICAL GEOMETRY PROVISIONAL
smoothLensGeometry.reason: Use a native Figma EllipseNode for every lens and contour in these exemplars. It guarantees smooth joins and avoids the sharp polygonal artifacts rejected by the owner.
required: one fixed -14 degree screen-coordinate orientation for the r14 exemplar
external bevel or material response remains outside the opening
all contour strokes have round caps and round joins

optionalCubicFallback.joinContinuity: C1 minimum; matched collinear handles at every join

tagline.name: Footer / Permanent tagline
tagline.text: CATCH THE STARS  /  MAKE THE DISTANT TANGIBLE

anatomyPanelTemplate.panelFillPolicy: Use the exact renderer literal declared on the page because no canonical variable has the exact value.

sections.name: Definition
sections.content: Field Gradient maps the governed seven-stop spectrum to measured gravitational depth. It is a data-shaped field treatment, not a decorative rainbow.

sections.name: Construction and source
sections.content:
SOURCE RAMP  90 degrees
MAPPING  native tangent-continuous field contours
APERTURE  owner-selected Continuous Lens direction
TRAJECTORY  one separate flat #C6FF24 path
AFFINITY  native gradient and editable cubic curves

sections.name: Exact tokens, assets, styles, or material recipe
Variants, modes, states, and optical sizes
sections.content:
SOURCE STRIP  verification only
FIELD STROKE  approved mapped use
MASKED DEPTH  allowed when topology is unchanged
VIOLET STOP  excluded from this recipe
SIGNAL LIME  never graded

sections.name: Usage
sections.content: Use for spatial depth, field magnitude, or calibrated reveal. The mapped bend must survive at distance. Keep the treatment subordinate to the active Signal Lime trajectory.

sections.name: Accessibility, bilingual behavior, and RTL
sections.content: Do not rely on hue alone. Preserve contour spacing, line hierarchy, labels, and high-contrast trajectory. Supply a one-color translation and avoid low-luminance text over the field.

sections.name: Motion and interaction
sections.content: Stops remain fixed to the governed field. Motion may reveal or traverse data, but may not rotate the palette, cycle hues, or detach the gradient from topology. Reduced motion shows the final mapped state.

sections.name: Production and export
sections.content: Keep the seven stops and transform native. Record profile conversion, output gamut, banding test, screen/print translation, and one-color fallback. Never bake the master as a bitmap.

sections.name: Correct examples
sections.content: Correct: restrained seven-stop field mapped to exact contours with one independent flat Lime trajectory and an inspectable source ramp.

sections.name: Misuse
sections.content: Reject full-page rainbow fills, generic aurora, Violet added without governance, Lime gradients, unrelated blobs, white gaps, banding, or gradients detached from field geometry.

sections.name: Provenance, hashes, status, and evidence
sections.content:
GOVERNED
SOURCE  docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-15-bizarre-masterbrand-library-architecture.md

sections.name: Definition
sections.content: Continuous Lens v2 is the owner-selected aperture direction: a broad asymmetric absence with tangent-continuous curvature and no sharp outline event. The visual direction is approved; the final numerical construction remains governed-provisional until exact geometry and production evidence are promoted.

sections.name: Construction and source
sections.content:
OUTLINE  four native cubic segments
CONTINUITY  tangent-continuous at every join
ORIENTATION  -14 degrees / screen coordinates
FIELD  broad orbital compression
CORNERS / CHAMFERS / NOTCHES  none
REFERENCE  owner-selected left ImageGen direction

sections.name: Exact tokens, assets, styles, or material recipe
sections.content:
REFERENCE SHA  62511ef6bfa1f028…
VECTOR  native Affinity cubic curves
FIELD STOPS  governed 0 / 17 / 34 / 49 / 66 / 82 / 100%
OUTLINE  smooth closed oval
STATUS  OWNER-APPROVED DIRECTION / VECTOR CONSTRUCTION PROVISIONAL

sections.name: Variants, modes, states, and optical sizes
sections.content:
FAR  broad unmistakable absence
NORMAL  registered Continuous Lens and trajectory
CLOSE  inspectable cubic construction and field spacing
PHYSICAL  external bevel only; silhouette never changes

sections.name: Usage
sections.content: Use only where absence, reveal, capture, or field compression is structurally meaningful. Preserve the approved smooth silhouette direction, fixed orientation, and registration with the Atlas field.

sections.name: Accessibility, bilingual behavior, and RTL
sections.content: Preserve contrast, target size, focus visibility, bilingual ordering, logical RTL flow, and a text-independent state cue.

sections.name: Motion and interaction
sections.content: Motion follows Capture logic only when it communicates state. Provide reduced-motion and low-power equivalents; static brand surfaces use N/A.

sections.name: Production and export
sections.content: Retain native editable cubic curves. Verify tangent continuity, optical-size survival, cut/reveal tolerance, minimum radius, substrate depth, and any external bevel independently from the outline.

sections.name: Correct examples
sections.content: Correct: one physical law, one active Lime signal, exact governed geometry, explicit source and status.

sections.name: Misuse
sections.content: Reject every sharp edge, outline chamfer, wedge, notch, key cut, polygonal join, mirrored silhouette, cosmetic badge fill, unregistered reveal, or claim that provisional numerical geometry is canonical.

structuralAssertions: target frame ID and page ID are unchanged
exactly eleven named top-level layer frames exist in the declared order
every anatomy section exists once and in source order
06.01 native reconstruction has exactly 53 native contour ellipses
every lens and contour node is an EllipseNode or the declared four-cubic fallback
no polygon, star, line-segment silhouette, notch boolean, or miter join exists
the Modes collection is explicitly void on 04.01 and paper on 06.01
all visible text uses the declared exact family/style pair
Signal Lime is flat #C6FF24 and absent from every gradient stop
06.01 and its internal concept reference remain nonpublishable and locked as declared
visualAssertions: compare the 04.01 native target beside node 60:2 at 1440 by 4300
compare the 06.01 native target beside node 60:4 at 1440 by 4100
retain node 60:6 for the owner-selected Continuous Lens same-input comparison
fix cropped text, incorrect padding, wrong fonts, wrong gradient direction, contour aliasing, and any sharp lens edge before proceeding
repeat the same-input comparison after every visible fix

promotionGates.04.01: May be considered publishable only after structural, visual, accessibility, one-color, and export evidence pass and no rejected geometry is present in the export.
promotionGates.06.01: Remains governed-provisional and nonpublishable even after exemplar QA; promotion requires explicit owner approval plus numerical geometry and production evidence.
